import psycopg2
conn = psycopg2.connect\("postgresql://josh:password@localhost:5432/nba"\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)

# 1. Check open_close view definition
cur.execute\("""
    SELECT view_definition FROM information_schema.views
    WHERE table_schema='odds' AND table_name='nba_game_lines_open_close'
"""\)
print\("View def:", cur.fetchone\(\)[0][:500]\)

# 2. Check rows in nba_game_lines_open_close
cur.execute\("SELECT COUNT\(*\), MIN\(as_of_date\), MAX\(as_of_date\) FROM odds.nba_game_lines_open_close"\)
print\("open_close rows:", cur.fetchone\(\)\)

# 3. Sample nba_game_lines_open_close
cur.execute\("""
    SELECT as_of_date, home_team_abbr, away_team_abbr, 
           close_spread_home_points, close_total
    FROM odds.nba_game_lines_open_close
    WHERE bookmaker_key='draftkings'
    LIMIT 5
"""\)
print\("Sample open_close rows:"\)
for r in cur.fetchall\(\): print\(" ", r\)

# 4. Check team name format in nba_games vs odds
cur.execute\("SELECT home_team_abbr, away_team_abbr FROM raw.nba_games LIMIT 3"\)
print\("nba_games abbrs:", cur.fetchall\(\)\)

# 5. How many final games in nba_games
cur.execute\("SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM raw.nba_games WHERE status='final'"\)
print\("Final games:", cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\)

conn.close\(\)
EOF)

import psycopg2
from datetime import date
conn = psycopg2.connect\('postgresql://josh:password@localhost:5432/nba'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
# Check coverage of prop lines in the DB by season
cur.execute\('''
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN as_of_date < %s THEN '2023-24'
            WHEN as_of_date < %s THEN '2024-25'
            ELSE '2025-26'
        END AS season,
        COUNT\(DISTINCT as_of_date\) AS days,
        COUNT\(*\) AS total_rows
    FROM odds.nba_player_prop_lines
    WHERE bookmaker_key = %s
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY 1
''', \(date\(2024, 10, 1\), date\(2025, 10, 1\), 'draftkings'\)\)
print\('DK prop line coverage:'\)
for r in cur.fetchall\(\):
    print\(f'  {r}'\)
conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/josh/Git/SuperNovaBets && source .venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import psycopg2, pandas as pd, numpy as np
conn = psycopg2.connect\('postgresql://josh:password@localhost:5432/nba'\)
df = pd.read_sql\('''
    SELECT p.game_slug, p.game_date_et, p.home_team_abbr, p.away_team_abbr,
           p.pred_run_diff::float AS pred_rd, p.edge_run_line::float AS edge_rl,
           p.run_line_bet_side, p.actual_run_diff::float AS act_rd, p.run_line_covered,
           p.actual_home_score::int AS h_score, p.actual_away_score::int AS a_score
    FROM bets.mlb_game_predictions p
    JOIN features.mlb_game_training_features f ON f.game_slug = p.game_slug
    WHERE p.actual_home_score IS NOT NULL
''', conn\)
conn.close\(\)
df['game_date_et'] = pd.to_datetime\(df['game_date_et']\)
bets = df[df['edge_rl'].abs\(\) >= 1.5].copy\(\)
bets['error'] = bets['pred_rd'] - bets['act_rd']
bets['bet_team'] = bets.apply\(lambda r: r.home_team_abbr if r.run_line_bet_side=='home' else r.away_team_abbr, axis=1\)

# STL games specifically
stl = bets[bets['bet_team']=='STL']
print\('=== STL BETS \(0-3\) ==='\)
for _, r in stl.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f'  {r.game_date_et.date\(\)} {r.away_team_abbr}@{r.home_team_abbr}: '
          f'pred={r.pred_rd:+.1f} act={r.act_rd:+.1f} err={r.error:+.1f} score={r.a_score}-{r.h_score} side={r.run_line_bet_side}'\)

print\(\)
sf = bets[bets['bet_team']=='SF']
print\('=== SF BETS \(2-5\) ==='\)
for _, r in sf.sort_values\('game_date_et'\).iterrows\(\):
    outcome = 'WIN' if r.run_line_covered else 'LOSS'
    print\(f'  {outcome} {r.game_date_et.date\(\)} {r.away_team_abbr}@{r.home_team_abbr}: '
          f'pred={r.pred_rd:+.1f} act={r.act_rd:+.1f} err={r.error:+.1f} score={r.a_score}-{r.h_score} side={r.run_line_bet_side}'\)

print\(\)
mia = bets[bets['bet_team']=='MIA']
print\('=== MIA BETS \(2-5\) ==='\)
for _, r in mia.sort_values\('game_date_et'\).iterrows\(\):
    outcome = 'WIN' if r.run_line_covered else 'LOSS'
    print\(f'  {outcome} {r.game_date_et.date\(\)} {r.away_team_abbr}@{r.home_team_abbr}: '
          f'pred={r.pred_rd:+.1f} act={r.act_rd:+.1f} err={r.error:+.1f} score={r.a_score}-{r.h_score} side={r.run_line_bet_side}'\)

print\(\)
# Are our bad teams \(STL, SF, MIA\) consistently where the model over-rated them?
print\('=== MODEL BIAS: avg pred_rd vs avg actual_rd by team we bet on ==='\)
team_bias = bets.groupby\('bet_team'\).apply\(
    lambda g: pd.Series\({'n': len\(g\), 'avg_pred': g.pred_rd.mean\(\), 'avg_act': g.act_rd.mean\(\),
                          'bias': g.error.mean\(\), 'wins': g.run_line_covered.sum\(\)}\)
\).sort_values\('bias', ascending=False\)
print\('Teams where model most over-predicts their dominance \(pred >> actual\):'\)
print\(team_bias[team_bias['n'] >= 3][['n','wins','avg_pred','avg_act','bias']].round\(2\).to_string\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import requests, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)
from mlb_pipeline.crawler_oddsapi import OddsCrawlerConfig
cfg = OddsCrawlerConfig\(\)

# Test the historical player props endpoint
# The Odds API historical endpoint: /v4/historical/sports/{sport}/events/{eventId}/odds
# First check if historical events endpoint exists
url = 'https://api.the-odds-api.com/v4/historical/sports/baseball_mlb/events'
params = {
    'apiKey': cfg.oddsapi_key,
    'date': '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z',
    'dateFormat': 'iso',
}
r = requests.get\(url, params=params\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
print\('Credits used by this call:', r.headers.get\('x-requests-used'\)\)
print\('Credits remaining:', r.headers.get\('x-requests-remaining'\)\)
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json\(\)
    events = data.get\('data', []\)
    print\(f'Events returned: {len\(events\)}'\)
    if events:
        print\('First event:', events[0].get\('id'\), events[0].get\('home_team'\), 'vs', events[0].get\('away_team'\), events[0].get\('commence_time'\)\)
        print\('Sample event ID for prop test:', events[0].get\('id'\)\)
else:
    print\('Response:', r.text[:500]\)
" 2>&1)

import requests, json, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)
from mlb_pipeline.crawler_oddsapi import OddsCrawlerConfig
cfg = OddsCrawlerConfig\(\)

# Test historical player props for a specific event
event_id = 'a7ee9fc9ac1db47a494d6c4c39dfc4de'
url = f'https://api.the-odds-api.com/v4/historical/sports/baseball_mlb/events/{event_id}/odds'
params = {
    'apiKey': cfg.oddsapi_key,
    'date': '2026-04-01T18:00:00Z',  # snapshot time
    'markets': 'batter_home_runs,batter_hits,batter_total_bases,batter_walks,pitcher_strikeouts',
    'regions': 'us',
    'bookmakers': 'draftkings,fanduel',
    'oddsFormat': 'american',
    'dateFormat': 'iso',
}
r = requests.get\(url, params=params\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
print\('Credits remaining:', r.headers.get\('x-requests-remaining'\)\)
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json\(\)
    # Show structure
    event = data.get\('data', {}\)
    bookmakers = event.get\('bookmakers', []\)
    print\(f'Bookmakers: {[b[\\"key\\"] for b in bookmakers]}'\)
    if bookmakers:
        markets = bookmakers[0].get\('markets', []\)
        print\(f'Markets available: {[m[\\"key\\"] for m in markets]}'\)
        for mkt in markets[:2]:
            print\(f'  {mkt[\\"key\\"]}: {len\(mkt.get\(\\"outcomes\\", []\)\)} outcomes'\)
            print\('  Sample:', mkt.get\('outcomes', []\)[:3]\)
else:
    print\('Error:', r.text[:500]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/josh/Git/SuperNovaBets && source .venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import requests, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)
from mlb_pipeline.crawler_oddsapi import OddsCrawlerConfig
cfg = OddsCrawlerConfig\(\)

# Check what the historical events endpoint returns for the snapshot date too
# The historical endpoints need the snapshot date \(as_of\), not just the event date
url = 'https://api.the-odds-api.com/v4/historical/sports/baseball_mlb/events'
params = {
    'apiKey': cfg.oddsapi_key,
    'date': '2026-04-01T18:00:00Z',  # snapshot AT this time
    'dateFormat': 'iso',
}
r = requests.get\(url, params=params\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
print\('Credits remaining:', r.headers.get\('x-requests-remaining'\)\)
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json\(\)
    events = data.get\('data', []\)
    print\(f'Events: {len\(events\)}'\)
    if events:
        event_id = events[0]['id']
        print\('Event ID:', event_id, '| Game:', events[0].get\('home_team'\), 'vs', events[0].get\('away_team'\)\)
        
        # Now try historical props for this event at this snapshot time
        url2 = f'https://api.the-odds-api.com/v4/historical/sports/baseball_mlb/events/{event_id}/odds'
        params2 = {
            'apiKey': cfg.oddsapi_key,
            'date': '2026-04-01T18:00:00Z',
            'markets': 'batter_hits,batter_home_runs,pitcher_strikeouts',
            'regions': 'us',
            'bookmakers': 'draftkings,fanduel',
            'oddsFormat': 'american',
            'dateFormat': 'iso',
        }
        r2 = requests.get\(url2, params=params2\)
        print\('Props status:', r2.status_code\)
        print\('Credits remaining:', r2.headers.get\('x-requests-remaining'\)\)
        if r2.status_code == 200:
            d2 = r2.json\(\).get\('data', {}\)
            bks = d2.get\('bookmakers', []\)
            print\('Bookmakers:', [b['key'] for b in bks]\)
            if bks:
                mkts = bks[0].get\('markets', []\)
                print\('Markets:', [m['key'] for m in mkts]\)
                if mkts:
                    print\('Sample outcomes:', mkts[0].get\('outcomes', []\)[:3]\)
        else:
            print\('Props error:', r2.text[:300]\)
" 2>&1)
